---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed papers, datasets, and in-prep work by Connor L. Brown on stream ecosystem ecology and biogeochemistry."
toc: true
number-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>#title-block-header .description { display: none; }</style>
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
source("R/render-pubs.R")
grp <- load_pub_groups()
PUB_HTML <- compose_section(grp$published, "No published work yet.")
WRK_HTML <- compose_section(grp$working, "No working papers listed.")
DATASETS_HTML <- compose_section(grp$datasets, "No datasets listed.")
```
## Papers
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
cat(PUB_HTML)
```
## Datasets
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
cat(DATASETS_HTML)
```
## In-Prep
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
cat(WRK_HTML)

```
